description: §16.4 clean neg — a caller passing ONLY slotted children (no unslotted stray content) to a spread-less component body SHALL NOT fire E-COMPONENT-031.
rationale: §16.4 fires the unslotted-children error only when the caller provides content that is neither slot-assigned nor absorbed by a spread. Every child of this `<Card>` use carries a `slot="header"` attribute, so there is no unslotted content left over.
